---
title: "CANUPO train and classify point clouds"
id: activity-spat-analysis-5
order: 143
summary: "The CANUPO suite is a simple and efficient way to automatically classify a point cloud."
source_url: "https://www.cloudcompare.org/doc/wiki/index.php/CANUPO_(plugin)"
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
materials:
  - activity-spat-analysis-6
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis
labels:
  - advanced
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/activity-spat-analysis-5.md"
---

Read about the CANUPO plugin:

<https://www.cloudcompare.org/doc/wiki/index.php/CANUPO_(plugin)>

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
